mapper.select:
SELECT r.fk_offer_submit_id AS offerSubmitId, r.fk_memberid AS memberId, TO_CHAR(r.viewed_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS viewedAt, r.response_status AS responseStatus, TO_CHAR(r.responded_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS respondedAt,
s.title AS title, s.message AS message, TO_CHAR(s.expire_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS expireAt, TO_CHAR(s.send_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS sendAt,
s.fk_offer_letter_id AS offerLetterId,
jp.job_id AS jobId, jp.title AS postTitle, jp.work_type AS workType, jp.career_type AS careerType, jp.salary AS salary,
c.fk_memberid AS companyMemberId, c.company_name AS companyName, c.ceo_name AS ceoName, c.industry_code AS industryCode, c.addr1 AS addr1, c.addr2 AS addr2,
ci.company_type AS companyType, ci.homepage_url AS homepageUrl, TO_CHAR(ci.open_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS openDate,
rg.region_name AS regionName,
(SELECT I.file_url FROM tbl_image_file I WHERE I.target_type = 'company' AND I.filecategory = 'logo' AND I.target_id = ci.company_intro_id AND ROWNUM = 1) AS companyLogo
FROM tbl_offer_response r
JOIN tbl_offer_submit s ON s.offer_submit_id = r.fk_offer_submit_id
JOIN tbl_job_posting jp ON jp.job_id = s.fk_job_id
JOIN tbl_company c ON c.fk_memberid = jp.fk_memberid
LEFT JOIN tbl_company_intro ci ON ci.fk_memberid = c.fk_memberid
LEFT JOIN tbl_region rg ON rg.region_code = jp.fk_region_code
WHERE r.fk_memberid = #{memberId}
ORDER BY s.send_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "totalCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 0 AND r.viewed_at IS NULL AND (s.expire_at IS NULL OR s.expire_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "unreadCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 0 AND r.viewed_at IS NOT NULL AND (s.expire_at IS NULL OR s.expire_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "pendingCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "acceptedCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "rejectedCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN r.response_status = 0 AND s.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND s.expire_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "expiredCount" FROM tbl_offer_response r JOIN tbl_offer_submit s ON s.offer_submit_id = r.fk_offer_submit_id WHERE r.fk_memberid = #{memberId}

SELECT s.title AS "offerTitle", jp.fk_memberid AS "companyMemberId", m.name AS "memberName" FROM tbl_offer_submit s JOIN tbl_job_posting jp ON jp.job_id = s.fk_job_id JOIN tbl_member m ON m.memberid = #{memberId} WHERE s.offer_submit_id = #{offerSubmitId}
